fields.title: read_thread tool implementation
fields.description: Implement the read_thread tool that retrieves and formats session content for agent consumption.
fields.design: Create read_thread tool in extensions/tau/src/thread/index.ts. Tool accepts {threadID: string, goal?: string} parameters (AMP-compatible). Resolve threadID to session path using catalog. Use SessionManager.open(path).buildSessionContext() to get resolved branch context. Format output as markdown transcript with session metadata (title, id, cwd, timestamps, parent thread). Include relevant message content: user messages, assistant text, tool results, compaction/branch summaries. Omit internal noise: tau:state, invisible custom entries, thinking blocks, hidden bash output. If goal provided, use deterministic relevance scoring (token overlap, phrase match) to select most relevant sections while preserving chronology. Hard-cap output size (~20k chars) with explicit truncation notice.
